caption: The video captures a scene where a group of people, including officials and bystanders, are gathered outside a building. A man in a white shirt and green vest is holding papers and appears to be addressing the group, possibly explaining or instructing them on a matter of importance. He gestures with his right hand, emphasizing his points. Surrounding him are several individuals, some wearing uniforms and others in casual attire, all attentively listening. The setting suggests an official event or announcement, with a police officer standing nearby, adding to the formal atmosphere. The background includes a metal gate and some signage, indicating that this might be taking place at a public or governmental facility. The overall mood seems serious and focused, as everyone involved appears engaged in the discussion.
